examples: It was a real prize due to its rarity and good condition.
The value of antiques will depend on their condition and rarity.
Now for cost and rarity, spices aren't native to Europe and they had to be imported.
What a rarity: a big-think policy entrepreneur who knows how to get things done in government.
And besides, the rarity of an injustice should not impact whether that injustice is remedied.
